# PartSelect's robots.txt file.
User-agent: *
	
	# Temp directory
	Disallow: /tmp/
	Disallow: /load/
	
	# Order confirmation page
	Disallow: /confirm.aspx
	Disallow: /Confirm.aspx
	Disallow: /CONFIRM.ASPX
	Disallow: /confirm/
	Disallow: /ShoppingCart.aspx

	Disallow: /Secure/
